mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (order_id, reviewer_id, reviewee_id, rating, comment, reviewer_role) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{reviewerId}, #{revieweeId}, #{rating}, #{comment}, #{reviewerRole})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM review WHERE reviewee_id = #{revieweeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM review WHERE reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(rating), 0.0) FROM review WHERE reviewee_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE reviewee_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}
